ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "dev_priority" TEXT /* Development priority for the feature */,
  "admin_ui" TEXT /* Indicates if the feature is accessible from the admin UI */,
  "ui_end_user" TEXT /* Indicates if the feature is available to end users */,
  "stability" TEXT /* Stability rating of the feature */,
  "feature_set" TEXT /* Assessment of the feature set and power */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is deprecated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the feature */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feature_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature request */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature being requested */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the resolution of the request */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_requests_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feature_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_requests_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature related to the bug */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reporting the bug */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was reported */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the bug (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bug report */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the resolution of the bug */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feature_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, end user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "auth_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external authentication method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_auth_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_method_id") REFERENCES external_auth_methods ("auth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the feature */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the feature was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, interact) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the feature usage in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_usage_logs_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_auth_methods" (
  "auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the authentication method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the authentication method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how it works */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the authentication method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the authentication method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control_lists" (
  "acl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ACL entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted or denied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ACL entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ACL entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_lists_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_lists_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stability_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stability rating */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature */,
  "rating_value" TEXT /* Stability rating value (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stability rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stability rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stability_ratings_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the theme */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "theme_description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the theme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the theme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_themes_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)
